keyEvents.text: Romelu Lukaku (Belgium) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match because of an injury Alireza Beiranvand (IR Iran).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Saeid Ezatolahi (IR Iran) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match (Belgium).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
First Half ends, Belgium 0, IR Iran 0.
Substitution, IR Iran. Alireza Jahanbakhsh replaces Saleh Hardani.
Second Half begins Belgium 0, IR Iran 0.
Substitution, Belgium. Timothy Castagne replaces Thomas Meunier.
Substitution, Belgium. Dodi Lukébakio replaces Alexis Saelemaekers.
Substitution, Belgium. Hans Vanaken replaces Nicolas Raskin.
Substitution, IR Iran. Mehdi Torabi replaces Mohammad Mohebbi.
Substitution, IR Iran. Milad Mohammadi replaces Ehsan Hajisafi.
Nathan Ngoy (Belgium) is shown the red card.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Belgium. Arthur Theate replaces Romelu Lukaku.
Substitution, IR Iran. Shahriyar Moghanloo replaces Saman Ghoddos.
Substitution, IR Iran. Amirhossein Hosseinzadeh replaces Saeid Ezatolahi.
Substitution, Belgium. Matias Fernandez-Pardo replaces Kevin De Bruyne.
Second Half ends, Belgium 0, IR Iran 0.
